description: CompositionBlack sleeveless top made of 100% vortex viscose, has a front opening with draped panels which hang down at the front, a shorter hemline at the back and gathers from empire-line seamFitRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentWash dark colours seperatelyDo not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & printDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironThis super soft pure black draped, open-front top by lee is designed with a special viscose rayon to give a perfectly draped sihouette. With a subtle silky appearance, it  provides a chic look that's easy to layer, and is perfect for a casual evening date. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute top layer.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
